summary: Replayed ADR 0275 from the synchronized exact-main baseline on April 3, 2026 after `origin/main` stabilized at repository version `0.177.150` and platform version `0.130.93`, cut repository version `0.177.151`, converged the private Apache Tika runtime on `runtime-ai-lv3`, recovered the Docker bridge chains automatically after the guest firewall refresh dropped the `DOCKER` nat chain, and reverified `/version`, `/tika`, and `/meta` from both the Proxmox host and the guest before advancing the live platform truth to `0.130.94`.

verification.observed: `scripts/release_manager.py status --json` confirmed the release blockers were satisfied on top of repository version `0.177.150`, and `LV3_SKIP_OUTLINE_SYNC=1 scripts/release_manager.py --bump patch --released-on 2026-04-03` prepared repository version `0.177.151` for the exact-main replay.

`uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest -q tests/test_tika_runtime_role.py tests/test_tika_playbook.py tests/test_tesseract_ocr_runtime_role.py tests/test_gotenberg_runtime_role.py tests/test_generate_platform_vars.py tests/test_service_id_resolver.py tests/test_docker_runtime_role.py` passed with `101 passed in 15.47s`, and `make syntax-check-tika`, `make syntax-check-gotenberg`, and `make syntax-check-tesseract-ocr` all passed from the rebased worktree.

verification.check: Security posture, vulnerability budget, and immutable-guest gate
verification.observed: `scripts/security_posture_report.py --env production --skip-lynis --skip-trivy --print-report-json` refreshed `receipts/security-reports/20260403T062829Z.json`; `python3 scripts/vulnerability_budget.py --service tika --json` approved the replay; and `make immutable-guest-replacement-plan service=tika` confirmed no ADR 0191 immutable replacement override was required because Apache Tika now runs on `runtime-ai-lv3`.

verification.check: Exact-main Apache Tika replay on runtime-ai-lv3
verification.observed: `make live-apply-service service=tika env=production` completed successfully with final recap `runtime-ai-lv3 : ok=171 changed=5 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=37 rescued=1`; the replay automatically recovered from the transient Docker bridge-chain loss introduced by the guest firewall refresh, and the follow-on restic trigger wrote `receipts/restic-backups/20260403T063547Z.json`.

verification.check: Host-side private endpoint verification after exact-main replay
verification.observed: The Proxmox-host probe confirmed `tcp_connect=ok` to `10.10.10.90:9998`; `GET /version` returned `Apache Tika 3.2.3`; `PUT /tika` returned the expected plaintext `Hello Tika` fixture; and `PUT /meta` returned `application/json` with `X-TIKA:Parsed-By` including `org.apache.tika.parser.DefaultParser` and `org.apache.tika.parser.html.JSoupParser`.

verification.check: Guest-local runtime verification after exact-main replay
verification.observed: The guest-local probe on `runtime-ai-lv3` showed the `tika` container healthy, listeners on both `0.0.0.0:9998` and `[::]:9998`, `GET /version` returning `Apache Tika 3.2.3`, `PUT /tika` returning the expected plaintext fixture, and `PUT /meta` returning metadata JSON with `X-TIKA:Parsed-By` set to `org.apache.tika.parser.DefaultParser` and `org.apache.tika.parser.html.JSoupParser`.

verification.check: Repository automation and guarded push-path validation
verification.observed: The final exact-main tree passed `scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces generated-docs generated-portals data-models health-probes alert-rules agent-standards`, `make remote-validate`, and `make pre-push-gate`; the build-server remote lane passed `workstream-surfaces`, `agent-standards`, `ansible-syntax`, `schema-validation`, `atlas-lint`, `policy-validation`, `iac-policy-scan`, `alert-rule-validation`, `type-check`, and `dependency-graph`, and the full pre-push gate passed every blocking lane including `ansible-lint`, `artifact-secret-scan`, `generated-docs`, `generated-portals`, `security-scan`, `semgrep-sast`, `service-completeness`, `packer-validate`, `tofu-validate`, and `integration-tests`.

notes: This receipt replaces `2026-04-02-adr-0319-runtime-ai-pool-mainline-live-apply` as the canonical `tika` latest-receipt pointer in `versions/stack.yaml` and `workstreams.yaml`.
No ADR 0191 in-place mutation override was required for this replay because Apache Tika now runs on `runtime-ai-lv3`, not on the immutable-policy-governed `docker-runtime-lv3` guest.

The first manual post-apply probe used the wrong `/meta` request shape and returned HTTP 406; the canonical host-side and guest-local evidence was rerun with the same HTML fixture and `Accept: application/json` contract that the repo-managed role verifies.
